description_long: This object is a modern solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a prominent rectangular structure with a large, flat solar panel mounted on top. The solar panel is supported by a robust frame and overhangs the main body, which appears to be constructed from concrete or a similar material. The structure includes a raised platform with a railing and a staircase, suggesting access for maintenance or monitoring. The base is set on a textured, tiled surface, likely to provide stability and weather resistance. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on functionality, suitable for urban environments such as parks or public spaces. No visible electrical cabling or inverter components are apparent from the exterior.
description: A robust, rectangular solar energy installation with a large flat solar panel, raised platform, and staircase, set on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solar panel overhang, platform with railing, and staircase beneath the structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, block-like body and the overhanging solar panel with no visible access features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the structure, with the platform and solar panel visible but no entry points.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and partial underside of the platform, with the staircase partially visible.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: roof-mounted on a concrete platform with metal supports
